zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen於1125年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯時，他的父親Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin27歲，母親Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein22歲。他於大約1158年與Hedwig von Brandenburg在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年2月18日在德國享年65歲，埋葬在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen于1125年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯时，他的父亲Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin27岁，母亲Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein22岁。他于大约1158年与Hedwig von Brandenburg在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年2月18日在德国享年65岁，埋葬在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meißen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Ernst.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mein   1.

variants.name: Mein
meanings: German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, Meino, a short form of various compound names with the first element magin ‘strength, might’, for example Meinhardt . Compare Main 7.
German: nickname from Middle High German mein ‘mean, nasty’.

Scottish and English: perhaps a variant of Main or Meen. Meen is either a nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’, from the Middle English personal name Mene (which is of uncertain origin). Alternatively, it could conceivably be a habitational name from East and West Meon (Hampshire), which take their names from the river Meon (of unexplained etymology).

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: 'der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Reiche'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Hans, Hermann, Juergen, Winfried.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen was born in 1125, in Kreis Meißen, Saxony, Germany, his father, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, was 27 and his mother, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, was 22. He married Hedwig von Brandenburg about 1158, in Meißen, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 February 1190, in Germany, at the age of 65, and was buried in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen est né en 1125, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Brandenburg environ 1158, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 février 1190, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen 1125 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin 27 und seine Mutter Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein 22. Er hat um 1158 in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland Hedwig von Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Februar 1190 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Deutschland und wurde in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

Lui sposato Hedwig von Brandenburg circa 1158, nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 febbraio 1190, nel Germania, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen(이)가 1125년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1158년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 Hedwig von Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 2월 18일 독일에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 노센에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen nasceu em 1125, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Brandenburg aproximadamente 1158, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1190, em Alemanha, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Meißen, Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Ger: миssен, крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen родился в 1125 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Brandenburg около 1158 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 февраля 1190 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности носсен, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия.

Se casó con Hedwig von Brandenburg aproximadamente 1158, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1190, en Alemania, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania.
